{"command":"$pwsh = Get-Command pwsh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($pwsh) { & $pwsh.Source -NoLogo -NoProfile -Command '$PSVersionTable.PSVersion; Get-Module PnP.PowerShell -ListAvailable | Sort-Object Version -Descending | Select-Object -First 3 Name,Version,Path | Format-Table -AutoSize' } else { Write-Output 'pwsh-not-found'; $PSVersionTable.PSVersion }","explanation":"Checks for PowerShell 7 and any installed PnP.PowerShell module versions.","goal":"Inspect local PnP PowerShell prerequisites","mode":"sync","timeout":120000}

{"command":"pwsh -NoLogo -NoProfile -Command \"Set-PSRepository -Name PSGallery -InstallationPolicy Trusted; Install-Module PnP.PowerShell -Scope CurrentUser -Force -AllowClobber; Import-Module PnP.PowerShell; Get-Module PnP.PowerShell -ListAvailable | Sort-Object Version -Descending | Select-Object -First 1 Name,Version,Path | Format-Table -AutoSize\"","explanation":"Installs the stable PnP.PowerShell module from PSGallery for the current user and verifies it can be imported.","goal":"Install PnP.PowerShell","mode":"sync","timeout":600000}

{"command":"pwsh -NoLogo -NoProfile -Command \"Import-Module PnP.PowerShell; Get-Command Register-PnPEntraIDAppForInteractiveLogin,Connect-PnPOnline,Get-PnPConnection | Select-Object Name,Version,Source | Format-Table -AutoSize; Get-Help Register-PnPEntraIDAppForInteractiveLogin -Parameter SharePointDelegatePermissions | Out-String\"","explanation":"Checks the available PnP registration and connection commands plus the permission parameter shape before starting auth.","goal":"Verify PnP app registration commands","mode":"sync","timeout":120000}

Name                                      Version Source
----                                      ------- ------
Register-PnPEntraIDAppForInteractiveLogin 3.2.0   PnP.PowerShell
Connect-PnPOnline                         3.2.0   PnP.PowerShell
Get-PnPConnection                         3.2.0   PnP.PowerShell


-SharePointDelegatePermissions [<Permission[]>]
    Specify which Microsoft SharePoint Delegate permissions to request.
    
    Required?                    false
    Position?                    0
    Default value                
    Accept pipeline input?       false
    Aliases                      none
    Accept wildcard characters?  false

{"command":"pwsh -NoLogo -NoProfile -Command \"$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; Import-Module PnP.PowerShell; Register-PnPEntraIDAppForInteractiveLogin -ApplicationName 'PnP.PowerShell Local' -Tenant 'tenanttocheck.onmicrosoft.com' -SharePointDelegatePermissions AllSites.Read\"","explanation":"Registers a delegated interactive Entra ID app for PnP PowerShell with read access to SharePoint for the inferred tenant.","goal":"Register PnP delegated app","mode":"sync","timeout":600000}
